title: Unlimited Skills MCP skills server config
description: Optional configuration for `unlimited-skills mcp serve`. The server is stdio-only and local-only; it exposes skills_search (metadata only), skills_view (one capped body), and skills_use (view plus a local learning event, never script execution).

root.description: Skill library root. Defaults to UNLIMITED_SKILLS_ROOT or ~/.unlimited-skills/library.

view_char_cap.description: Maximum characters of one skill body returned by skills_view/skills_use before the truncation marker.

search_limit_max.description: Hard cap on skills_search hit counts.
